chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI JCM NO. 11 of 2009 _____________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge For hearing of Main Petition. 07.04.2026. Mr. Abdul Qayyum Abbasi, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Atif Hafeez, Advocate for the Respondent.......... Learned counsel for the Petitioner submits that since the matter has been privately settled between the parties, he does not press the instant Petition, which stands dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Ayaz
